mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_instance (id, definition_id, business_key, business_type, initiator_id, current_node, status, start_time, end_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{definitionId}, #{businessKey}, #{businessType}, #{initiatorId}, #{currentNode}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime}, #{deleted}, #{version})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wf_instance WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE wf_instance SET definition_id = #{definitionId}, business_key = #{businessKey}, business_type = #{businessType}, initiator_id = #{initiatorId}, current_node = #{currentNode}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE wf_instance SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
